chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1381 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A No.5479/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.08.2025. Mr. Malik Bux Mari, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G Sindh a/w Inspector Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP, Hyderabad & Inspector/I.O Babar Akber from PS GOR. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* In compliance of Order dated 28.07.2025, I.O/Inspector Babar Akber has appeared before this Court. He is directed to record the statement of Petitioner No.1 (Mst. Ayat). Upon doing so, under Section 161 Cr.P.C., he has submitted a copy of her statement, which is duly taken on record. In her statement, Petitioner No.1 has categorically affirmed that she was neither abducted nor forcefully kidnapped by Petitioner No.2. She further stated that at her own accord contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2, without any coercion or compulsion and that being sui juris, she exercised her right to free will. The I.O has submits that the statement of Petitioner No.1 will be duly considered, and upon proper investigation, a final report under Section 173 Cr.P.C. will be submitted before the concerned Magistrate for an appropriate order. Accordingly, the present petition stands disposed of. The official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners when they approach to them. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
